_disclaimer: APPROXIMATE DATA — Capacity figures are public estimates from industry reports and news. Not audited or officially verified. Locations are county-level approximations. Replace with official public datasets before policy use.
_sources: Company press releases and investor relations (public)
CBRE/JLL data center market reports (public summaries)
